                          Search Results

                            Skills | Expedition 33 Wiki


                            Skills in Clair Obscur Expedition 33 are abilities that can be unlocked by obtaining Skill Points through leveling up the playable Characters. Leveling up a character will grant you 1 skill point to unlock a new skill, and 3 attribute points to increase your character's Attributes. Each character will have a skill tree that displays the various skills that they can unlock, simply interact with an Expedition Flag and selecting "Learn Skills."

                             

                            Clair Obscur Expedition 33 All Skills Guide

                            What are Skills in Clair Obscur Expedition 33?

                            Skills are special abilities that are used in the turn-based combat battles, each character has their own set of special skills that they use in combat. Each character may have 6 skills equipped at a time, this can be changed by going into the Character Overview menu and selecting one of the skill slots in the bottom middle of the screen. Here, you can change out the skills you wish to use in each battle. This allows you to have full control of your kit when going up against various types of Enemies or Bosses.

                            How to Obtain New Skills in Clair Obscur Expedition 33?

                            Gain XP by defeating Enemies and Bosses to level up your characters. When a character has reached a new level, your character will be granted 1 Skill Point and 3 Attribute Points. Proceed to look for an Expedition Flag, and choose the option "Learn Skill" to use your skill point on a skill you desire to unlock. Each skill will vary in cost as seen on their skill tree. You can also respec all spent Skill Points by using a Recoat.

                             

                            All Skills in Clair Obscur Expedition 33

                            All Skills Table
                            All Skills Gallery

                             

                            Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 All Skills Comparison Table Guide

                            Quick Search of All Expedition 33 Skills 

                            Name AP Cost Character Prerequisite Skill Effect

                            From Fire
                            		 4 Gustave Marking Shot

                            Deals medium single target damage. 3 hits. Uses weapon's element.

                            Heals  self by 20% if the target Burns 

                            Lumiere Assault
                            		 3 Gustave N/A

                            Deals low single target damage. 5 hits. Uses weapon's element.

                            Critical Hits  generate 1 Additional Charge .

                            Marking Shot
                            		 2 Gustave Overcharge Deals low single target Lightning damage. 1 hit. Applies Mark 

                            Overcharge
                            		 4 Gustave N/A

                            High Lightning damage based on the amount of Charges . 1 hit.

                            Can Break 

                            Powerful
                            		 3 Gustave Lumiere Assault

                            Applies Powerful  to 1-3 allies, increasing the damage they deal for 3 turns. Gives 0 to 2 Charges 

                            Recovery
                            		 3 Gustave Powerful

                            Recovers  50% Health and dispels Status Effects.

                            Gives 0-2 Charges 

                            Shatter
                            		 5 Gustave Recovery

                            Deals High Lightning damage to all enemies. 1 hit.

                            Can Break . If a target is Broken  by the hit, Overcharge is fully Charged .

                            Strike Storm
                            		 7 Gustave From Fire

                            Deals very high single target damage. 6 hits. Uses Weapon's element. Critical Hits  generate 2 additional Charges 

                            Crippling Tsunami
                            		 5 Lune Thermal Transfer

                            Deals medium Ice damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Slow  for 3 turns.

                            Consumes    for greatly increased damage.

                            Crustal Crush
                            		 7 Lune Rockslide

                            Deals High single target Earth and Break damage . 5 hits.

                            Consumes  : Increased Damage.

                            Earth Rising
                            		 3 Lune Ice Lance

                            Deals low Earth damage to all enemies. 1 hit.

                            Consumes  for increased damage.

                            Electrify
                            		 1 Lune Thunderfall

                            Deals low single target Lightning damage. 3 hits. Critical Hits  trigger an additional hit.

                            Consumes   to generate one Light Stain 

                            Elemental Genesis
                            		 4 Lune Elemental Trick

                            Deals extreme damage to all enemies. 8 hits. Each hit deals damage in a random element.

                            Can only be cast with    

                            Elemental Trick
                            		 3 Lune Mayhem

                            Deals low single target Ice, Fire, Lightning, and Earth damage. 4 hits.

                            Critical Hits  generate the corresponding Stain.

                            Fire Rage
                            		 5 Lune Wildfire

                            Deals increasingly high Fire damage to all enemies every turn until Lune receives damage. Stuns self if interrupted.

                            Consumes  : Increased Damage

                            Healing Light
                            		 3 Lune Ice Lance, Immolation

                            Heals  the targeted Ally and dispels Status Effects.

                            Consumes : Costs 0 AP 

                            Hell
                            		 9 Lune Fire Rage

                            Deals very high Fire damage that applies 5 Burn  per hit to all enemies. 2 hits. Deals self-damage if failed.

                            Consumes   : Greatly increased damage.

                            Ice Lance
                            		 4 Lune N/A

                            Deals medium single target Ice damage that Slows  the target. 1 Hit.

                            Consumes  to deal increased damage.

                            Immolation
                            		 2 Lune N/A

                            Deals low single target Fire damage and 3 Burn . 1 hit.

                            Applies 2 more Burns  if the target is Marked .

                            Consumes  for increased damage.

                            Lightning Dance
                            		 7 Lune Electrify

                            Deals very high single target Lightning damage. 6 hits. Critical Hits  trigger an additional hit.

                            Consumes   : Greatly increased damage.

                            Mayhem
                            		 3 Lune Electrify or Thermal Transfer

                            Consumes all Stains to deal high elemental damage to the target.

                            Can Break  if 4 Stains are consumed.

                            Rebirth
                            		 5 Lune Healing Light

                            Revives an ally with 30-70% Health and 2 additional AP.

                            Consumes : Costs 0 AP.

                            Revitalization
                            		 5 Lune Rebirth

                            Heals  1-3 allies by 40-60% Health.

                            Consumes  to also apply Regen  that heals on turn start for 3 turns.

                            Rockslide
                            		 5 Lune Earth Rising

                            Deals medium single target Earth damage. 2 hits. Can Break 

                            Consumes  for greatly increased damage.

                            Sky Break

                            3

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Lune Reach Relationship Level 7 with Lune.

                            Deals extreme damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Element depends on which Stains Lune has the most. Can Break 

                            Storm Caller
                            		 6 Lune Lightning Dance

                            All enemies receive medium Lightning damage at the end of their turn, and low Lightning damage when they receive damage. Duration: 3 turns.

                            Consumes   for double thunder strikes on turn end.

                            Terraquake
                            		 5 Lune Crustal Crush

                            Deals low Earth damage and Break damage  to all enemies every turn. Also increases all Break damage  received by 50%. Duration: 3 turns.

                            Consumes   to increase the Duration to 5 turns.

                            Thermal Transfer
                            		 2 Lune Earth Rising

                            Deals low single target Ice damage. 2 hits. Gains 4 AP if target is Burning 

                            Consumes  : Play a second turn.

                            Thunderfall
                            		 5 Lune Immolation

                            Deals medium Lightning damage to random enemies. 2-6 hits. Critical Hits  trigger an additional hit.

                            Consumes   for increased damage.

                            Tree of Life

                            2

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Lune Reach Relationship Level 4 with Lune.

                            Cleanses all Status Effects and Heals  all allies.

                            Tremor

                            1

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Lune Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available upon progressing the story.

                            Deals high Earth damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Removes all enemies' Shields 

                            Typhoon
                            		 8 Lune Crippling Tsunami

                            On turn start, deals high Ice damage to all enemies and Heals  allies.

                            Consumes  : Duration increased from 3 to 5 turns.

                            Wildfire
                            		 4 Lune Thunderfall

                            Deals medium Fire damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies 3 Burn 

                            Consumes  : Increased Damage

                            Breaking Rules
                            		 3 Maelle Fleuret Fury

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 2 hits. Destroys all target's Shields  Gains 1 AP  per Shield destroyed.

                            If target us Defenceless , play a second turn.

                            Burning Canvas
                            		 5 Maelle Phantom Strike or Stendhal

                            Change Stance: Offensive

                            Deals high single target Void damage. 5 hits. Applies 1 Burn  per hit. Damage increased for each Burn  on the targe

                            Combustion
                            		 4 Maelle Rain of Fire

                            Deals medium single target Physical Damage. 2 Hits.

                            Consumes up to 10 Burn  for increased damage.

                            Degagement
                            		 2 Maelle Spark, Guard Down

                            Deals low single target Fire damage. 1 hit. Target becomes weak to Fire damage for 2 turns.

                            Egide
                            		 3 Maelle Guard Up

                            Protects allies by taking damage in their place, for 2 turns. Duration is extended by 1 on gaining Shell 

                            Fencer's Flurry
                            		 4 Maelle Breaking Rules

                            Deals medium damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element.

                            Applies Defenceless  for 1 turn.

                            Fleuret Fury
                            		 6 Maelle Guard Up

                            Deals high single target Physical damage. 3 hits. If in Virtuose Stance, stay in Virtuose Stance

                            Can Break

                            Gommage

                            3

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Maelle Reach Relationship Level 7 with Maelle.

                            Kills weak targets. Otherwise deals extreme Void damage. 1 hit.

                            Guard Down
                            		 3 Maelle Guard Up or Degagement

                            Change Stance: Offensive

                            Applies Defenceless  to all enemies for 3 turns.

                            Guard Up
                            		 3 Maelle Swift Stride

                            Applies Shell , reducing damage taken, to up to 3 allies for 3 turns.

                            Gustave's Homage
                            		 8 Maelle Automatically unlocked through story progression after completing the Forgotten Battlefield location.

                            Deals high single target Lightning damage. 8 hits. Increased damage to Marked  targets, Doesn't remove Mark.

                            Last Chance
                            		 1 Maelle Mezzo Forte

                            Reduces self-Health to 1 but refills all AP 

                            Switches to Virtuose Stance 

                            Mezzo Forte
                            		 1 Maelle Degagement

                            Reapplies current stance and gives 2-4 AP 

                            Momentum Strike
                            		 7 Maelle Egide

                            Deals high single target damage. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. Increased damage to Marked  targets.

                            Virtuose Stance : Costs 4 AP 

                            Offensive Switch
                            		 1 Maelle N/A

                            Deals low single target damage and applies Defenceless  for 3 turns. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element.

                            Payback
                            		 9 Maelle Last Chance or Momentum Strike

                            Deals very high single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Reduced AP  cost for each attack parried since last turn.

                            Can Break

                            Percee
                            		 5 Maelle N/A

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Increased damage to Marked  targets.

                            Virtuose Stance : Costs 2 AP 

                            Phantom Strike
                            		 7 Maelle Offensive Switch or Burning Canvas

                            Change Stance: Defensive

                            Deals very high Void damage to all enemies. 4 hits. Also gives +35% of a Gradient Charge.

                            Phoenix Flame

                            2

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Maelle Reach Relationship Level 4 with Maelle.

                            Applies 10 Burn  to all enemies and revives all allies with 50 to 70% Health.

                            Pyrolyse
                            		 9 Maelle Revenge

                            Deals extreme single target Fire damage. 3 hits. Applies 5 Burn  per hit.

                            Offensive Stance: Applies 2 more Burn  per hit.

                            Rain of Fire
                            		 5 Maelle Degagement

                            Deals medium single target Fire damage. 2 hits. Applies 3 Burn  per hit.

                            Defensive Stance: applies 2 more Burn  per hit.

                            Revenge
                            		 5 Maelle Combustion

                            Deals high single target Fire damage. 1 hit. Damage increased for each hit received since the previous turn.

                            Can Break 

                            Spark
                            		 3 Maelle Offensive Switch

                            Deals low single target Fire damage. 1 hit. Applies 3 Burn 

                            Offensive Stance: Applies 2 more Burn 

                            Stendhal
                            		8 Maelle Percee or Burning Canvas

                            Change Stance: Stanceless

                            Deals extreme single target Void damage. 1 hit. Removes self-Shields  and self applies Defenceless 

                            Swift Stride
                            		 3 Maelle Percee

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Switches to Virtuose Stance  if target is Burning 

                            Regains 0 to 2 AP 

                            Sword Ballet
                            		 9 Maelle Fencer's Flurry

                            Deals extreme single target damage. 5 hits. Uses weapon's element.

                            Critical Hitsdeal double damage.

                            Virtuose Strike

                            1

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Maelle Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available upon progressing the story.

                            Deals high single target Physical damage. 5 hits

                            All Set
                            		 6 Sciel Card Weaver

                            Applies Shell , Powerful , and Rush  to all allies.

                            Bad Omen
                            		 3 Sciel Marking Card

                            Deals low Dark damage to all enemies. 2 hits.

                            Applies 2 Foretell  per hit.

                            Card Weaver
                            		 3 Sciel Dark Cleansing

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Propagates target's Foretell  to all enemies. Plays a second turn.

                            Dark Cleansing
                            		 0 Sciel Spectral Sweep

                            Cleanses an ally of their Status Effects and propogates the target's buff to all allies.

                            Dark Wave
                            		 6 Sciel Grim Harvest or Delaying Slash

                            Deals high Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Consumes all Foretell  to deal additional damage.

                            Delaying Slash
                            		 5 Sciel Bad Omen

                            Deals medium single targe damage. 2 hits. Uses weapon's element.

                            Consumes Foretell  to increase damage and delay target's turn.

                            Doom

                            2

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Sciel Reach Relationship Level 4 with Sciel.

                            Deals very high single target Dark damage. 3 hits. Applies Powerless , Defenceless , and Slow  for 3 turns. Can Break 

                            End Slice

                            3

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Sciel Reach Relationship Level 7 with Sciel.

                            Deals extreme single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Damage is increased for each Foretell  consumed since the beginning of the battle.

                            Final Path
                            		 9 Sciel Dark Wave

                            Deal extreme single target Dark damage and applies 10 Foretell  1 hit.

                            Can Break 

                            Firing Shadow
                            		 3 Sciel Searing Bond

                            Deals low Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Consumes 1 Foretell  per hit for increased damage.

                            Focused Foretell
                            		 2 Sciel N/A

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Applies 2 Foretell 

                            Applies 3 additional Foretell  if target has 0 Foretell 

                            Fortune's Fury
                            		 5 Sciel Firing Shadow

                            Targeted ally deals double damage for 1 turn.

                            Grim Harvest
                            		 5 Sciel Sealed Fate

                            Deals medium single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Heals  all allies by 30% Health.

                            Consumes Foretell  to increase Heal  by 5% per Foretell 

                            Harvest
                            		 3 Sciel Twilight Slash

                            Deals medium single target damage. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element.  Heals  self by 40% Health.

                            Consumes all Foretell  to increase Heal  by 5% per Foretell 

                            Intervention
                            		 5 Sciel Dark Cleansing

                            Targeted ally plays immediately and gains 4 AP 

                            Marking Card
                            		 3 Sciel Focused Foretell

                            Deals medium single target Dark damge. 2 hits. Applies Mark  to the target.

                            Applies 3 Foretell 

                            Our Sacrifice
                            		 4 Sciel Fortune's Fury

                            Deals extreme Dark damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Absorbs allies' Health and enemies'  Foretell  to deal increased damage.

                            Phantom Blade
                            		 5 Sciel Twilight Slash

                            Deals high single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Consumes all Foretell  to deal additional damage.

                            Can Break 

                            Plentiful Harvest
                            		 4 Sciel Firing Shadow

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 2 hits.

                            Consumes all Foretell  on a target and gives 1 AP  to a party member for each Foretell  consumed.

                            Rush
                            		 3 Sciel Focused Foretell

                            Applies Rush  to 1-3 allies, increasing their speed for 3 turns.

                            Sealed Fate
                            		 4 Sciel Phantom Blade

                            Deals high single target damage. 5-7 hits. Uses weapon's element. Each hit can consume 1 Foretell  to deal 200% more damage.

                            Critical Hitsdon't remove the Foretell  but still gets the damage increase.

                            Searing Bond
                            		 4 Sciel Harvest

                            Deals medium single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Applies 5 Foretell 

                            Also deals damage and applies Foretell  to every other Burning  enemies.

                            Shadow Bringer

                            1

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Sciel Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available upon progressing the story.

                            Deals high single target Dark damage to random enemies. 10 hits.

                            Applies 1 Foretell  per hit.

                            Spectral Sweep
                            		 7 Sciel Rush

                            Deals medium single target damage. 2 to 6 hits. Uses weapon's element.

                            Applies 1 Foretell  per hit. Critical Hits apply an additional Foretell 

                            Twilight Dance
                            		 9 Sciel Final Path or All Set or Our Sacrifice

                            Deals extreme single target Dark damage. 4 hits. During Twilight , extends Twilight  duration by 1 turn.

                            Consumes all Foretell  to deal additional damage.

                            Twilight Slash
                            		 2 Sciel N/A

                            Deals low single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Consumes all Foretell  to deal additional damage.

                            Angel's Eyes

                            3

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Verso Reach Relationship Level 7 with Esquie.

                            Deals extreme Physical Damage. 8 hits. Gain 1 additional Perfection  per hit. Applies Aureole to Verso, reviving him if he dies.

                            Ascending Assault
                            		 5 Verso Blitz

                            Deals low single target damage. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. Increase damage at each cast.

                            : Costs 2 AP 

                            Assault Zero
                            		 3 Verso N/A

                            Critical Hits generate 1 additional Perfection 

                            : Increased damage.

                            Berserk Slash
                            		 4 Verso Quick Strike

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Damage is increased for each health Verso is missing.

                            : Increased damage

                            Blitz
                            		 3 Verso Purification

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Plays a second time. Kills non-boss enemies with less than 10% health.

                            : Increased damage.

                            Burden
                            		 1 Verso Berserk Slash

                            Removes all Status Effects from all allies and applies them to Verso.

                            Gains 1 Rank.

                            Defiant Strike
                            		 3 Verso Berserk Slash

                            Deals high single target Physical damage that applies Mark  2 hits. Costs 30% of current Health.

                            : Increased damage.

                            End Bringer
                            		 9 Verso Light Holder or Steeled Strike

                            Deals extreme single target Physical damage. 6 hits. Increased damage if the target is Stunned 

                            : Can reapply Stun 

                            Follow Up
                            		 5 Verso Purification

                            Deals medium single target Light damage. 1 hit. Damage increased for each Free Aim shot this turn, up to 10 times.

                            : Costs 2 AP 

                            From Fire
                            		 4 Verso  N/A

                            Deals medium single target damage. 3 hits. Uses weapon's element. Heals  self by 20% Health if the target Burns 

                            : Increased damage.

                            Leadership
                            		 3 Verso Powerful

                            Reduces current Rank. Gives 2-4 AP  to other allies.

                            : +1 more AP  to other allies

                            Light Holder
                            		 4 Verso Radiant Slash

                            Medium single target Light damage. 5 hits. At completion, gains 1 Rank.

                            : +2 AP 

                            Marking Shot
                            		 2 Verso Assault Zero

                            Deals low single target damage. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. Applies Mark 

                            : Increased damage

                            Overload
                            		 6 Verso Follow Up or Speed Burst

                            Increases Rank to  and refills all AP  but sets self-Health to 1.

                            Paradigm Shift
                            		 1 Verso Purification or Quick Strike

                            Deals low Physical single target damage and gives 1-3 AP  back. 3 hits.

                            :  +1 AP 

                            Perfect Break
                            		 7 Verso Blitz or Berserk Slash

                            Deals very high single target Light damage. 1 hit.  Can Break 

                            Rank  on Break 

                            : Costs 5 AP 

                            Perfect Recovery
                            		 3 Verso From Fire (Verso)

                            Recovers  50% Health and dispels Status Effects. Gives 0-2 Perfection 

                            : Increased heal to 100% Health.

                            Phantom Stars
                            		 9 Verso Burden

                            Deals extreme Light damage to all enemies. 5 hits. Can Break 

                            : Costs 5 AP 

                            Powerful
                            		 3 Verso Quick Strike

                            Applies Powerful  to 1-3 Allies, increasing damage they deal for 3 turns. Gives 0-2 Perfection 

                            : Duration increased to 5 turns.

                            Purification
                            		 5 Verso Perfect Recovery

                            Deals single target medium Light damage. 2 hits. Dispels self Status Effects.

                            : Increased damage.

                            Quick Strike
                            		 2 Verso Marking Shot

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 1 hit.

                            : Gives more Perfection 

                            Radiant Slash
                            		 2 Verso Blitz

                            Deals low Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Can Break 

                            : Increased damage.

                            Sabotage

                            1

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Verso Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available upon progressing the story.

                            Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Mark 

                            Speed Burst
                            		 6 Verso Ascending Assault or Overload

                            Deals high single target Light damage. 5 hits. Damage increased by Speed difference with the target.

                            : Increased damage

                            Steeled Strike
                            		 9 Verso  Strike Storm or End Bringer

                            After 1 turn, deals extreme single target Physical damage. 13 hits. Interrupted if any damage taken.

                            : Increased damage.

                            Striker

                            2

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Verso Reach Relationship Level 4 with Esquie.

                            Deals high single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Can Break 

                            Strike Storm
                            		 7 Verso Defiant Strike

                            Deals very high single target damage. 5 hits. Uses weapon's element. Critical Hits generate 2 additional Perfection 

                            : Increased damage

                            Abbest Wind
                            		 2 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Abbest enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 1 hit. Plays a second turn.

                             Agile Mask: Costs 0 AP 

                            Aberration Light
                            		 7 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Aberration enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 2 hits. Applies 4 Burn  per hit.

                             Agile Mask: Applies 2 more Burn  per hit.

                            Ballet Charm
                            		 2 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ballet enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Light damage. 1 hit. Applies Powerless  to the taret for 3 turns.

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage.

                            Benisseur Mortar
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Benisseur enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Ice damage. 3 hits. Change to  Almighty Mask if target is Marked 

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage.

                            Braseleur Smash
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Braseleur enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium finslge target Fire damage and applies 3 Burn . 2 hits.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Break Point

                            3

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Monoco Reach Relationship Level 7 with Monoco.

                            Deals extreme single target damage. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element.

                            Fills the target's Break Bar and Breaks  it.

                            Boucheclier Fortify
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Bouchelier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Applies Shell  to 1-3 Allies for 3 turns.

                             Heavy Mask: Also applies 1 Shield 

                            Bruler Bash
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Bruler enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Can Break 

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage.

                            Chalier Combo
                            		 7 Monoco

                            Starting skill of Monoco upon joining the party.

                            Deals high single target Physical damage. 6 hits. Interrupted if failed.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Chapelier Slash
                            		 7 Monoco

                            Defeat and acquire the foot of a Chapelier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Mark 

                             Agile Mask: Increased damage.

                            Chevaliere Ice
                            		 6 Monoco

                            Defeat and acquire the foot of a Gold Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Ice damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Slow  to the targets for 3 turns.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Chevaliere Piercing
                            		 3 Monoco  Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ceramic Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals single target Physical damage through Shields . 6 hits. Damage increased for each Shield  on the target.

                             Agile Mask: Increased damage.

                            Chevaliere Thrusts
                            		 7 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Steel Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Physical damage to all enemis. 3 hits. Critical Hits deal double damage.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Clair Enfeeble
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Clair enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Powerless  for 3 turns.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Contorsionniste Blast
                            		 6 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Contorsionniste enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Heals  all allies by 10% Health for each enemy hit.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Creation Void
                            		 9 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Creation enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals extreme Void damage to random targets. 3 hits. More damage if the same target is hit multiple times.

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage

                            Cruler Barrier
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Cruler enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Applies 1-2 Shields  to the target.

                             Heavy Mask: Gives 2 AP  to the target.

                            Cultist Blood
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Greatsword Cultist enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Sacrifices 90% Health to increase damage.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Cultist Slashes
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Reaper Cultist enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Dark damage. 3 hits. Deals more damage the less Health Monoco has.

                             Agile Mask: Increased Damage.

                            Danseuse Waltz
                            		 8 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Danseuses enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high single target Fire damage. 3 hits. Deals more damage against Burning  targets.

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Demineur Thunder
                            		 2 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Demineur enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Lightning damage. 1 hit. Deals extra Break Damage 

                             Caster Mask: Increased Break damage.

                            Duallist Storm
                            		 8 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Dualliste enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals extreme single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Can Break 

                             Almighty Mask: Increased damage.

                            Echassier Stabs
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Echassier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 2 hits. Second hit applies Mark  to the target.

                             Agile Mask: Increased damage.

                            Eveque Spear
                            		 6 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Eveque enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high single target Earth damage and applies Powerless  for 3 turns. 1 hit.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Gault Fury
                            		 3 Monoco  Defeat and acquire the foot of a Gault enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Applies Mark 

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Glaise Earthquakes
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Glaise enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Earth damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Powerful  to self.

                             Heavy Mask: applies Powerful  to all allies.

                            Grosse Tete Whack
                            		 6 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Grosse Tete enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high single target Physical damage. 5 hits. Applies Defenceless  for 3 turns.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Hexga Crush
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Hexga enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Earth damage. 2 hits. Applies Defenceless  to the target for 3 turns.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Jar Lampstorm
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Jar enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 4 hits.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Lampmaster Light
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Lampmaster enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage at each cast.

                             Almighty Mask: Increased damage.

                            Lancelier Impale
                            		 2 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Lancelier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Ice damage. 1 hit. Slows  the target for 3 turns.

                             Agile Mask: Increased damage.

                            Luster Slices
                            		 3 Monoco  Defeat and acquire the foot of a Luster enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Applies Rush  to self for 3 turns.

                             Agile Mask: Increased damage.

                            Mighty Strike

                            1

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Monoco Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available upon progressing the story.

                            Deals double damage if the target is Stunned 

                            Goes to  Almighty Mask

                            Moissonneuse Vendange
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Moissoneusse enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals High single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Can Break 

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Obscur Sword
                            		 6 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Obscur enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high single target Dark damage. 5 hits. Deals more damage against Powerless  targets.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Orphelin Cheers
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of an Orphelin enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Applies Powerful  to 1-3 Allies.

                             Caster Mask: Also gives 3 AP  to targets.

                            Pelerin Heal
                            		 5 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Pelerin enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Applies Regen  to all allies.

                             Caster Mask: also Heals  40% Health.

                            Portier Crash
                            		 8 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Portier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Can Break 

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Potier Energy
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Potier enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Gives 1-3 AP  to all allies.

                             Caster Mask: Gives 1 additional AP 

                            Ramasseur Bonk
                            		 2 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ramasseur enemy while Monoco is in the active party. 

                            Deals low single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Can Break 

                             Agile Mask: fills 20% of the target's Break Bar.

                            Rocher Hammering
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Rocher enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Can Break 

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Sakapatate Estoc
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ranger Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals low single target Lightning damage. 1 hit. Deals more damage if the target is Stunned 

                             Balanced Mask: Increased damage.

                            Sakapatate Explosion
                            		 4 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Catapult Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals medium Lightning damage to random enemies. 3 hits. Critical Hits trigger an additional hit.

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage.

                            Sakapatate Fire
                            		 9 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of the Ultimate Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals extreme Fire to all enemies. 3 hits. Apply 3 Burn  per hit.

                             Almighty Mask: Increased damage.

                            Sakapatate Slam
                            		 7 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Robust Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage to Marked  targets.

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Sanctuary

                            2

                            (Gradient Charge Cost)

                            		 Monoco Reach Relationship Level 4 with Monoco.

                            Gives 2 Shields  and applies Regen  to all allies for 3 turns.

                            Sapling Absorption
                            		 6 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Sapling enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Deals high Dark damage. 3 hits. Recovers  5% Health on hit.

                             Caster Mask: Increased damage and double Heal 

                            Stalact Punches
                            		 4 Monoco N/A

                            Deals medium single target Ice damage. 4 hits. High Break damage 

                             Heavy Mask: Increased damage.

                            Troubadour Trumpet
                            		 3 Monoco Defeat and acquire the foot of a Troubadour enemy while Monoco is in the active party.

                            Applies a random buff to 1 to 3 allies.

                             Caster Mask: applies a second random buff.

                            Join the page discussion Tired of anon posting? Register!
                              • Anonymous
                                26 Feb 2026 15:58  

                                Crustal crush, immolation, thermal transfer, and elemental genesis all go very well together in a build. Also giving you 2 slots to work with to have something like lightning dance and revitalisation.

                                ReplyReplies (0)

                                0

                                +1

                                0

                                -1
                                • Anonymous
                                  31 May 2025 23:36  

                                  My loadout on each character (Endgame/NG+):

                                  Gustave
                                  - Strike Storm (effectively replaces Lumiere Assault once you unlock it)
                                  - Marking Shot (great early game synergy with Lune's and Maelle's kits)
                                  - Recovery (interchangeable with From Fire, I prefer this as it heals more, it's cheaper and works better in solo fights)
                                  - Powerful (it's ok, not a lot to pick from anyway)
                                  - Shatter (becomes your go-to break)
                                  - Overcharge (main break option before Shatter, your best nuke afterwards)

                                  Lune
                                  - Hell (when boosted outdamages even Genesis)
                                  - Typhoon (pair it with heal passives to generate buffs/AP), or if you play with low HP/inverted -> Crippling Tsunami (good AOE damage and slow)
                                  - Terraquake (helps whole party break)
                                  - Storm Caller (amazing if you use lots of multi hits or spam free aim shots)
                                  - Lightning Dance (best single target damage)
                                  - Elemental Genesis (slightly weaker than boosted Hell, but still situationally useful, as it's cheaper and not fire locked)

                                  Maelle
                                  - Last Chance (sets up all her plays + a third turn with shortcut)
                                  - Gustave 's Homage (fills the same role as Last Chance after the first cast, while also providing damage)
                                  - Pyrolyse (stacks a lot of burns, expecially in offensive stance)
                                  - Burning Canvas (favorite skill on her set, stacks with itself and snowballs in longer fights)
                                  - Phantom Strike (AOE, mainly for clearing adds)
                                  - Stendhal (I try to hold back from using it, but at times it comes in clutch and is a very cool finisher)

                                  Sciel
                                  - Fortune's Fury (use it on one of your main damage dealers, then accelerate their turn with Intervention)
                                  - Intervention (best skill in the game)
                                  - Dark Cleansing (refershes party buffs, heals with healing boon, can be clutch at times), if you play with low HP/inverted -> Delaying Slash
                                  - Final Path (good damage, breaks, fully refunds if you have a moon charge, maxes foretell stack)
                                  - Our Sacrifice (insanely strong AOE nuke, sets up all your low HP strats on other characters and can even "Intervention" them if they have Shortcut equipped)
                                  - Twilight Dance (best single target damage, extending twilight is the cherry on top)

                                  Verso
                                  - Overload (see Maelle's Last Chance, can also be used to drop from rank S to A to stunlock with Endbringer)
                                  - Berserk Slash (perfect synergy with Simoso/Overload/Survivor/Sciel's Our Sacrifice/anything that puts you at 1 HP)
                                  - Endbringer (strongest damage skill at S, even without the added effect)
                                  - Follow Up (cheap and reliable nuke after climbing to S rank by spamming shots)
                                  - Phantom Stars (AOE break and damage)
                                  - Steeled Strike (best value when paired with Sciel's Fortune's Fury + Intervention)

                                  Monoco
                                  - Creation Void (best single target damage)
                                  - Glaise Earthquakes (hits hard even on wrong masks, buffs team on heavy)
                                  - Chevalier Ice (flex AOE slow) or Chapelier Slash (flex AOE mark)
                                  - Lampmaster Light (strongest skill to spam in longer fights)
                                  - Sakapatate Fire (strong AOE damage and burn)
                                  - Dualliste Storm (best single target break)

                                  ReplyReplies (1)

                                  26

                                  +1

                                  3

                                  -1
